query:
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN content LIKE '%anrdoezrs.net%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as has_cj_links
FROM articles 
WHERE status = 'published' 
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10
